import { useState } from "react"; import { NavBar } from "./NavBar"; import { Footer } from "./Footer"; export function Registracija(){ const[ime,setIme]=useState(""); const[prezime,setPrezime]=useState(""); const[email,setEmail]=useState(""); const[telefon,setTelefon]=useState(""); const[adresa,setAdresa]=useState(""); const[datumRodjenja,setDatumRodjenja]=useState(); return( <>
Unesite ime setIme(e.target.value)} required/> Unesite prezime setPrezime(e.target.value)} required /> Unesite email setEmail(e.target.value)} required /> unesite telefon setTelefon(e.target.value)} required /> Unesite adresu setAdresa(e.target.value)} required /> Unesite datum rodjenja setDatumRodjenja(e.target.value)} required /> Napravi nalog
) }
